Reviews.Author: 26u9avvo35
Reviews.Comment: This cheat is overall good for the 10$, however, don’t expect anything crazy. I think it’s priced good for what it is, it has alright game support as well.

Categories.Comment: It’s good in combat, doesn’t have crazy stuff, just what’d you’d except in a aimbot/silent aim.
Not a big fan of the visuals, they look very clunky, don’t like how it’s presented and looks, but it has all the visuals you could need and has some customizability options.

Interface is too crammed imo, has like 8 tabs and is a little hard to find stuff, but everything is straight forward and sorted good. The issue I have with the interface is that it’s so long and you can’t change the length, it just barely fits on my monitor. (1920x1080)
Always has good uptime, quick updates. Stability wise, its optimizations aren’t much of a strong suit and it has some crashing issues. But overall its not a bad experience

Has good features, however, sometimes they don’t work as intended like no clip, gun motion for pf, etc. there’s some broken stuff in the menu. It has a good config setup for adding your own models to the cache, lua environment is alright as well, not the best I’d say.

Reviews.Author: 27j8har5ld
Reviews.Comment: Amazing external i would genuinely recommend this above anything else. Not only is it super cheap, but it’s also incredibly good, the aim features are great and there’s a ton of functionality, the ESP offers a shit ton of customization and options, and the raycast system for wall checks works flawlessly. The user interface is clean and polished, and they even include small quality of life touches like a built in music player, 10/10 could not recommend matcha enough.
